overview: Ideas Lab is a full-featured Enterprise Portal and Innovation System. It lets teams track ideas from conception through incubation to deployment, with persistent storage, real authentication, and a polished glassmorphic UI. All data lives in the backend and survives refreshes and updates.
features: Internet Identity authentication with protected routes
Dashboard with live stats (live projects, ideas, incubator) and charts
Ideas Lab — create, edit, delete ideas with photos, status badges, deadlines, and social links
Incubator — register projects with image/PPT/doc/source file uploads, edit details
Daily Mission Log — sequential task tracker with timestamps, edit and delete
Deployment Hub — log live deployments with URLs, GitHub links, engine and architecture tags
Settings — edit profile, upload profile photo, manage linked platforms
All data persists across sessions, refreshes, and canister upgrades
Glassmorphic UI with animated blob backgrounds, Plus Jakarta Sans typography
